steps.description: In the "1. CT volume - bone density for optimization" section, select the CT volume for processing.

sub_operations.description: Select the CT volume for segmentation and processing
sub_operations.question: Select the CT volume for bone density optimization.

choice_info.question: Select the CT volume for bone density optimization.

ui_guidance.title: Select CT volume for bone density optimization

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Bone_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module

ui_guidance.title: Create new segmentation 'Bone_Segmentation' in Segment Editor

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Bone_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment

operation_descriptions: Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Click the Threshold button in Segment Editor to open the threshold effect

operation_descriptions: Click the Threshold button in Segment Editor to open the threshold effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range
sub_operations.question: Adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

choice_info.question: Adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust threshold range
ui_guidance.instruction: Set the segmentation range using the slider.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the threshold segmentation

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Click the Islands button to open the islands effect

operation_descriptions: Click the Islands button to open the islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep largest island" option.

sub_operations.description: Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect

operation_descriptions: Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply the island selection

steps.description: In the "Bone segmentation" section, select the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Select the bone segment node for 3D reconstruction
sub_operations.question: Select the bone segment node.

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform 3D reconstruction of the selected bone segment

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point

ui_guidance.title: Adjust 3D view angle
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom to best view of glenoid cavity surface.

steps.description: In the "Markups" module, click "Point List" to create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point in the Markups module

operation_descriptions: Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point in the Markups module

steps.description: Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Place a fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface by clicking in the 3D view

ui_guidance.title: Place center point on glenoid cavity
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the point.

steps.description: In the "Planning point" section, select the MarkupsFiducial node.

sub_operations.description: Select the prosthesis center point fiducial for planning
sub_operations.question: Select the planning point fiducial node.

choice_info.question: Select the planning point fiducial node.

steps.description: Click the "Prosthesis implantation" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform initial prosthesis implantation using the selected fiducial point

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)" box. If not, proceed to Step 20.

sub_operations.description: Ask user if prosthesis adjustments are needed; if yes, enable transform handles checkbox and proceed to adjust, else skip to step 20
sub_operations.question: Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box if further adjustments are required.

choice_info.question: Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box if further adjustments are required.

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D transform handles.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust 3D transform handles on prosthesis

ui_guidance.title: Adjust 3D transform handles
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the transform handles to position the prosthesis.

steps.description: Click the "Update Prosthesis" button.

sub_operations.description: Confirm and update the prosthesis position after manual adjustment

steps.description: Click the "Plan" button.

sub_operations.description: Generate the surgical plan for the prosthesis

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust screw" box. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask user if screw adjustments are needed; if yes, enable checkbox and proceed to adjust, else stop the workflow
sub_operations.question: Check the 'Adjust screw' box if further adjustments are required.

choice_info.question: Check the 'Adjust screw' box if further adjustments are required.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust screw?
ui_guidance.instruction: Select 'Adjust screw' if needed, or 'No, stop' to finish.

steps.description: Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust endpoints of planning paths

ui_guidance.title: Adjust screw path endpoints
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag the endpoints of each planning path to the desired position.

steps.description: Click the "Update screw" button.

sub_operations.description: Confirm and update the screw position after manual adjustment
